rationale: In the citing paper, Tellis, Chandy, and Thaivanich (2000) is listed only in Table 2 as one of several JMR articles that reported holdout-sample fit diagnostics. The surrounding discussion uses these papers as catalog examples from a journal scan, without engaging this specific study's findings, model structure, or implications. There is no distinct argumentative, conceptual, or methodological dependence on the cited paper beyond this listing role.
